_doc: Synthetic fixtures hand-authored from the start-transaction-failures playbook (Branch 4: output connection not propagated to a child activity). The Start Transaction scope opens its connection fine, but the child Execute Query's ExistingDbConnection is left empty, so the child runs with a null connection and throws NullReferenceException. Replace with verbatim captures from a real .local/investigations/ before treating as a regression signal (see ../_shared/scripts/generate_scenario.py).

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key f5c8e6ab-7b92-4eaf-90c1-5c6d7e8f9012 --state Faulted --output json
or jobs logs a6d9f7bc-8ca3-4fb0-91d2-6d7e8f901234 --level Error --output json

rules._doc: Proxy open-ended docsai queries to the real uip CLI; cache results in _cache/.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns []. Lets the agent explore beyond the recorded path.
